narration: Witness the electrifying journey of TERMI, India's Valorant champion, as he leads Cloud9 to victory in the grand finals. Feel the roar of the crowd, the thrill of the game, and the moment of triumph. This is esports at its finest.
visual_prompts: A wide-angle shot of TERMI, donned in his Cloud9 jersey, sitting at a high-end gaming PC. The background shows his four teammates, each intensely focused on their screens. The room is bathed in dynamic, pulsating lights that sync with the game's action. The crowd in the esports arena is visible through a large screen, roaring and chanting TERMI's name.

A close-up shot of TERMI's face, showcasing his focused expression as he makes a critical in-game decision. The lighting shifts to a cool blue, highlighting the intensity of the moment. Overlay graphics show in-game statistics and highlights.

A celebratory shot capturing the moment of victory. TERMI and his teammates are seen jumping out of their chairs, cheering, and hugging each other. The background shows the esports stage with confetti falling and the crowd going wild. The lighting is bright and celebratory, with red and gold hues to evoke a festive Indian atmosphere.
